title: Extra Animated Blocks
description: Added animation for some more blocks.
body: **This resource pack is made to animate some blocks that i felt had the need to be animated. The pack is a QoL improvement pack.** Extra Animated Blocks is a vanilla-like texture pack that animates an array of blocks that in my mind made sense to be animated. It's simple and clean. So if you're looking for a simple resource pack that adds a bit more life to Minecraft then this one is for you! # 📺Showcase video of the pack: Video may or may not change with future pack updates. # ⬇️How to install: ### ☕Java: **1.** Download the pack on Modrinth **2.** Insert the pack into the "resourcepacks" folder in your MC directory. Most often that folder is located in "User>AppData>roaming>.minecraft". **3.** Launch Minecraft and activate the pack in-game via the Resource Packs menu in options. ### 🪨Bedrock: **1.** Check the description and the comments of my showcase video. Link: https://youtu.be/Q-2HfRf8k58?si=dRAogfMJX2RdSwKj I suggest using an ad/popup blocker on the sites in my vid since it has ads which could possibly be harmful. Modrinth isn't resposible given that any damage occurs. Just be safe if you wish to download the Bedrock Release. ## 🗒️Notes: Read the pack's "README" file for further customization of the pack. It explains how to remove certian animation textures if you perhaps do not like them. Blocks that are animated may change in possible future releases so please do check the versions description as well. In the Extra Animated Blocks Java Aspects Bedrock release, I suggest placing the Extra Animated Blocks above Java Aspects just for safe measure.
